sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21463" key="galaktouxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γᾰλακτ-ουχέω</orth>, <sense id="n21463.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suck milk</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:50" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.50</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γαλακτουχούσης</foreign> prob. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.64</biblScope> </bibl> of (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γαλακτούσης</foreign> codd.).</sense> </entryFree>
